message:
fix: Use return type annotation for closure return types

- closure_analysis.zig: Infer binop result type from operands (int+int→int)
- closure_gen.zig: Check func.return_type annotation before body analysis
  - Maps int/float/str/bool/None → Zig types (i64/f64/etc.)
  - Falls back to body analysis when no annotation present

Fixes test_simple_closure.py (def inner(y: int) -> int: return x + y)
Unit tests: 17/31 → 18/31 (58.1%)
